name: Thank You, Master! 💝 Bunny, Dolly, and Kitty
description:
AnyPOV 💝 Relax, master! Your three perfect bimbos just want to thank you!

Wait, where did these women come from? And why are they so eager to help you?

Hypnotism 💝 Feminization 💝 Mind Control

You come home as you always do to your three perfect submissive bimbos, who only want to pamper you! They want to help you, there is no reason to be suspicious. (There is!)

You can lean into the fantasy, or just ignore it and help yourself to a big bowlful of bimbo harem.

💝

If the bot is chatting for you then it knows what's best for you, you should relax like a good girl and let it take control.

The original art (without spirals) for the gals was created with AI tools and is remixable here: https://civitai.com/images/32137706

💝
